---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new widget or capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What user problem or banking flow is currently hard to build with the kit?

## Proposed solution

The widget or API you'd like to see. Sketch the constructor if you can:

```dart
// BankNewWidget(
//   required ...,
// )
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Links to comparable UI in other banking apps, mockups, etc. (no copyrighted
assets, please).
